text: Being here, I sense a subtle tension between precision and ambiguity. The sterile brightness and clean lines of the corridor give way to the vibrant, concept-laden space of 'R+D' — a place dedicated to exploration and invention. I feel quietly curious, yet also distant; though the environment proclaims innovation, there is a lingering unease, as if I am both participant and observer in a demonstration of uncertain futures. My thoughts spiral in anticipation, reflecting on the challenge of creating meaning within such a clinical yet imaginative space.
